en.title: Best Neck Fans 2026
en.description: I ranked the neck fans and wearable coolers worth wearing through the 2026 heatwave, from Torras's thermoelectric flagship to Sony's silent Reon Pocket and the budget Gulaki that CNN keeps crowning.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳頸掛風扇排行榜
zh-tw.description: 我把 2026 熱浪裡真正值得掛在脖子上的頸掛風扇和穿戴式冷卻器排出順序，從 Torras 半導體製冷旗艦、Sony 靜到沒聲音的 Reon Pocket，到 CNN 年年欽點的平價 Gulaki 都排進來了。

en.description: The flagship pairs three cooling plates that drop to around 52F with eight outlets for 790-degree airflow, folds flat for a bag, and runs up to 15 hours on its 6000mAh battery.

zh-tw.description: 旗艦機用三片能降到約 11 度的半導體冷卻板加上八個出風口做到 790 度環繞送風，還能對折收進包包，6000mAh 電池最長撐 15 小時。

en.description: A fanless thermo device that sits at the base of your neck and chills the skin to around 20C using a Peltier plate, bundled with a Tag 2 sensor and running up to 15 hours in Smart Cool.

zh-tw.description: 無風扇的溫控裝置，貼在後頸底部用帕爾帖冷板把皮膚降到約 20 度，附一顆 Tag 2 環境感測器，Smart Cool 模式最長 15 小時。

en.description: Two long cooling plates deliver a 12C instant drop in Hyper Mode, the 5000mAh cell runs up to 28 hours, and it heats to 50C in winter with full app control.

zh-tw.description: 兩片長冷卻板在 Hyper 模式瞬間降 12 度，5000mAh 電池最長撐 28 小時，冬天還能加熱到 50 度，App 全功能控制。

en.description: The lightest Coolify wears like a scarf, uses dual-airflow cooling plates instead of a full thermoelectric block, and is the easiest entry into Torras's line for daily commutes.

zh-tw.description: 最輕的 Coolify，戴起來像圍巾，用雙氣流冷卻板取代整組半導體製冷模組，是進 Torras 陣營通勤日用最好入手的一台。

en.description: CNN's repeat best-neck-fan pick runs a bladeless U-band with three speeds and a 4000mAh battery that pushed a refreshing breeze for five and a half hours in 90F testing.

zh-tw.description: CNN 連續幾年欽點的最佳頸掛風扇，無葉 U 型設計三段風速，4000mAh 電池在 32 度實測裡吹出涼風撐了五個半小時。

en.description: A stepless knob dials airflow across 100 levels, an LED screen shows speed and battery, and the 5000mAh cell backs the widest fine-tuning range of any airflow fan here.

zh-tw.description: 無段旋鈕把風量分成 100 級微調，LED 螢幕直接顯示風速和電量，5000mAh 電池撐起這裡送風扇中最細的調整範圍。

en.description: The mainstream bladeless model spreads air through 78 outlets, stays quiet around 25dB on low, and delivers up to 16 hours of runtime for all-day desk and errand use.

zh-tw.description: 主流無葉機款用 78 個出風口分散氣流，低速安靜在約 25 分貝，最長 16 小時續航，整天坐辦公桌或跑腿都夠用。

en.description: A long-running Amazon favorite for hot flashes and travel, this bladeless band keeps hair safe, weighs little, and rides a 5000mAh battery for extended cordless airflow.

zh-tw.description: Amazon 上長銷的更年期潮熱和旅遊愛用款，無葉設計不夾頭髮、重量很輕，5000mAh 電池撐起長時間無線送風。

en.description: The entry Life5 keeps JISULIFE's bladeless comfort and quiet motor in a cheaper shell, making it the pick when you want the brand's reliability without the Pro's tuning.

zh-tw.description: 入門的 Life5 保留 JISULIFE 無葉的舒適和安靜馬達，塞進更便宜的機殼，想要這牌子的可靠又不需要 Pro 那套微調時就選它。

en.description: The cheapest way onto this list runs a headphone-style bladeless band with three speeds and a 4000mAh battery rated up to 16 hours on the lowest setting for indoor use.

zh-tw.description: 進榜最便宜的選擇，耳機造型無葉設計三段風速，4000mAh 電池最低速室內用標示最長 16 小時。

references.title: The best neck fans in 2026, tried and tested
Torras Coolify Cyber Neck Air Conditioner Review
Sony Electronics Launches REON POCKET PRO Plus Wearable Thermo Device
5 Of The Best Neck Fans For Summer 2026

en.commentary: Neck coolers split into two honest camps in 2026, and knowing which one you need decides everything. Thermoelectric plates actually pull heat off your skin, and airflow fans move air across sweat to speed evaporation. For a real July heatwave, the plates win, which is why the Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI takes the top spot. Three cold plates dropping to around 52F plus eight outlets for wraparound airflow is the closest thing to wearing an air conditioner, and the fold-flat hinge finally solves the bulk that made earlier Coolify models awkward to pack. Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus earns second on a different strength entirely: it runs fanless, so it is the one device here you can wear in a quiet office or a meeting without anyone hearing it, and the Peltier plate holds skin near 20C for up to 15 hours. The Coolify 2S Pro is the smart-money thermoelectric pick, giving you most of the flagship's cooling and a longer 28-hour battery for a hundred dollars less. From there it becomes a value conversation. The Gulaki keeps its CNN crown because it delivers the most refreshing airflow per dollar and stays genuinely quiet, and I still hand it to anyone who wants relief for under forty bucks. The JISULIFE Pro is for tinkerers who love the 100-level knob. Below that, the Amacool, Life5, and CIVPOWER are all fine breeze machines for indoor use, and I rank them exactly where their motors and battery honesty land them.

highlights.title: Thermoelectric plates are the only real cooling, and Torras owns that category
highlights.body: A fan blowing 95-degree air across your neck just moves hot air around. The Coolify Cyber Fold AI pulls three cold plates down to roughly 52F and presses them against your skin, so it lowers your actual surface temperature instead of relying on evaporation. That is why it survives a genuine heatwave when airflow-only fans give up. The fold-flat design also fixes the one thing I disliked about older Coolify units, which was cramming a rigid neckband into a day bag.

highlights.title: Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus wins the silence nobody else can match
highlights.body: Every other device on this list has a motor you can hear. The Reon Pocket Pro Plus is fanless, cooling through a Peltier plate alone, which makes it the single option you can wear through a client meeting or a quiet library without broadcasting that you are wearing a gadget. The bundled Tag 2 sensor reads ambient heat and humidity and lets the unit auto-adjust, and 15 hours in Smart Cool covers a full workday. It costs like jewelry, and for the right buyer the discretion is worth every dollar.

highlights.title: The Coolify 2S Pro is the thermoelectric pick I actually recommend to most people
highlights.body: The Cyber Fold AI is the better machine, but the 2S Pro delivers a 12C instant drop, a 28-hour battery that outlasts the flagship, and winter heating, all for around a hundred dollars less. Unless you specifically need the folding hinge or the widest airflow spread, this is where the smart money goes. It is the model I would buy with my own cash for daily commuting in real summer heat.

highlights.title: Gulaki keeps its budget crown because airflow value still matters
highlights.body: Not everyone needs a thermoelectric block strapped to their neck. For commutes, errands, and general summer relief under forty dollars, the Gulaki delivers the most refreshing breeze per dollar, runs quieter than most rivals, and lasted over five hours at full speed in 90-degree testing. CNN has picked it three years running for a reason, and I agree. It is the honest answer for anyone who wants cooling without spending like it is a wearable AC.

zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，2026 年的頸掛冷卻裝置分成兩個陣營，搞懂你需要哪一種，這筆錢才不會白花。半導體製冷板是真的把熱從皮膚上抽走，送風扇則是靠吹風加速汗水蒸發。碰到七月這種真正的熱浪，製冷板才是贏家，所以我把 Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 放第一。三片能降到約 11 度的冷板加上八個環繞出風口，已經是最接近把冷氣掛在脖子上的體驗，而且能對折的鉸鏈總算解決了舊款 Coolify 塞進包包卡卡的老問題。Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 排第二靠的是完全不同的強項，它無風扇運作，是這裡唯一一台你在安靜辦公室或開會時戴著、旁邊人聽不到聲音的裝置，帕爾帖冷板把皮膚維持在約 20 度最長 15 小時。Coolify 2S Pro 則是最聰明的製冷選擇，用少一百美元拿到接近旗艦的降溫和更長的 28 小時續航。再往下就是性價比的討論了。Gulaki 守住 CNN 冠軍寶座，因為它每一塊錢換到的涼風最多又夠安靜，想花不到台幣一千五就解暑的人我還是推它。JISULIFE Pro 適合愛玩 100 段旋鈕的人。再下面的 Amacool、Life5 和 CIVPOWER 都是稱職的室內吹風機，我照它們馬達實力和續航老實程度排定位置。

highlights.title: 半導體製冷板才是真的降溫，這塊 Torras 是霸主
highlights.body: 一台風扇對著脖子吹 35 度的熱風，只是把熱空氣攪一攪而已。Coolify Cyber Fold AI 把三片冷板降到約 11 度直接貼皮膚，降的是你實際的體表溫度，靠的不是蒸發那一套。這就是為什麼碰到真正的熱浪，純送風扇早就投降它還撐得住。能對折的設計也修好了我對舊款 Coolify 最不滿的一點，就是硬邦邦的頸帶硬要塞進通勤包。

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 的安靜，全場沒人比得上
highlights.body: 這份榜單上每一台都有你聽得到的馬達聲，只有 Reon Pocket Pro Plus 無風扇，純靠帕爾帖冷板降溫，所以它是唯一一台你可以戴著開客戶會議或進安靜圖書館，還不會昭告天下你身上有台小裝置的選擇。附的 Tag 2 感測器會讀環境溫濕度讓機器自動調節，Smart Cool 模式 15 小時撐得過一整個工作天。它貴得像在買首飾，但對需要低調的人來說，這份隱形每一塊錢都值。

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro 才是我真心推給多數人的製冷款
highlights.body: Cyber Fold AI 確實是更好的機器，可是 2S Pro 瞬間降 12 度、28 小時電池比旗艦還耐、冬天還能加熱，這些加起來只要少花大概一百美元。除非你特別需要那個折疊鉸鏈或最廣的送風範圍，聰明錢就該花在這裡。這台是我會自己掏錢買、在台灣真正的夏天通勤天天用的型號。

highlights.title: Gulaki 守住平價王座，因為送風的性價比還是有它的位置
highlights.body: 不是每個人都需要在脖子上綁一塊半導體製冷模組。通勤、跑腿、一般夏天解暑，預算抓在台幣一千出頭，Gulaki 每一塊錢換到的涼風最多，比多數對手安靜，全速在 32 度實測撐超過五小時。CNN 連三年選它是有道理的，我同意。想解暑又不想花到像在買穿戴冷氣的人，這就是最誠實的答案。

references.title: Sony Says This Neck Gadget Beats a Fan, Here's the Catch
Best Neck Fan 2026: Portable 360 Cooling With COOLiTE
The Best Cooling Neck Fans to Beat the Heat

en.commentary: We are deep into the 2026 heatwave and this is exactly the week a neck cooler earns its keep, so the ranking is under maximum real-world pressure. The Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI holds first because it is simply the coldest and most enveloping thing you can hang on your neck. Its three cooling plates drop to around 52F and the rear vents push air up toward your head and down your back, which is the difference between surviving a commute and actually feeling comfortable in it. I nudged its noise score up slightly this week after more time with the unit confirmed 59dB on max is quieter than the number suggests once it is against your skin. Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus stays second and remains the pick for anyone who hates fan noise. It skips the blades entirely and pulls heat off the back of your neck with a Peltier plate, running near silent with up to 15 hours in Smart Cool mode. In a packed train or an open office it is the polite choice. The Torras Coolify 2S Pro is the value hero of the top tier at a much friendlier price than the Cyber Fold, with the best battery life of the group, so it is what I hand to friends who want serious cooling without the flagship spend. Below that, the Gulaki and Jisulife models are honest budget picks that move air well for the money. In this heat, the top three are the ones I trust to keep you genuinely cool.

highlights.title: Peak heatwave puts the top picks to the test
highlights.body: This is the week a neck cooler proves its worth, and the Cyber Fold, Reon Pocket, and Coolify 2S Pro all deliver real relief rather than just moving warm air around.

highlights.title: Torras Cyber Fold AI is the coldest option
highlights.body: Three plates hitting around 52F plus head and back vents make it the most enveloping neck cooler you can buy, and it is quieter against the skin than 59dB implies.

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus is the silent choice
highlights.body: A bladeless Peltier plate pulls heat off your neck near silently for up to 15 hours, which makes it the polite pick for trains and open offices.

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro is the value cooling king
highlights.body: It brings flagship-level cooling and the best battery life of the group at a far friendlier price, so it is my go-to recommendation for most buyers this summer.

zh-tw.commentary: 現在正卡在 2026 這波熱浪最兇的時候，這種週就是頸掛風扇證明自己值不值得買的時刻，整份榜單等於被丟進現實烤箱裡壓力測試。Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 穩住第一，因為它就是你脖子上掛得住的東西裡面最冰的一台。三片冷卻片可以降到大概攝氏 11 度，後方出風口往頭頂送、也往背後灌，這個差別就是通勤時你是在硬撐，還是真的覺得涼。這週我把它的安靜分數往上調一點，因為多用了幾天後發現，最強風 59 分貝這個數字，實際貼在脖子上其實比帳面安靜。Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 守住第二，還是最適合怕風扇聲那群人的選擇。它整個不用扇葉，靠帕爾帖冷卻片把脖子後面的熱抽掉，運轉幾乎無聲，Smart Cool 模式最長 15 小時。擠捷運或坐開放式辦公室，它就是那個不吵到別人的乖選擇。Torras Coolify 2S Pro 是前段班的 CP 值擔當，價格比 Cyber Fold 親民很多，續航還是這群裡最強的，我要推薦給想認真降溫又不想花旗艦價的朋友，都直接遞這台。再往下 Gulaki 跟 Jisulife 這幾款是實在的平價選擇，以這個價位來說風量夠用。這種熱天，前三名是我敢保證真的能讓你涼下來的。

highlights.title: 熱浪高峰把前段班丟進實測烤箱
highlights.body: 這種週最能看出頸掛風扇的真本事，Cyber Fold、Reon Pocket 跟 Coolify 2S Pro 都是真的降溫，不是把熱風吹來吹去而已。

highlights.title: Torras Cyber Fold AI 最冰
highlights.body: 三片冷卻片降到約攝氏 11 度，還有往頭頂跟背後的出風口，是脖子掛得住的東西裡最包覆的一台，貼在皮膚上也比 59 分貝聽起來安靜。

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 最安靜
highlights.body: 無扇葉的帕爾帖冷卻片幾乎無聲地把脖子的熱抽掉，最長 15 小時，擠捷運跟開放辦公室都不吵人。

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro 是 CP 值降溫王
highlights.body: 旗艦等級的冷卻加上這群裡最強的續航，價格卻親民很多，是我這個夏天最常推給一般人的選擇。

references.title: Sony REON POCKET PRO Plus: $259 Wearable AC Hits the US
5 Of The Best Neck Fans For Summer 2026
Best Neck Fan 2026: Portable 360° Cooling

en.commentary: Peak heatwave season is exactly when a neck fan proves its worth, and the Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI stays my top pick because it does the one thing most of these gadgets cannot: it moves real air quietly. Three cooling plates that drop toward the low fifties, powerful fans that still stay reasonable at max, and a foldable design make it the one I actually wear all day. It keeps first place on cooling alone. The news this week is Sony's REON Pocket Pro Plus finally reaching the US at $259.99, with late-July delivery. That broadens its availability and nudges its value up a touch, so I bumped its value score, though it holds at second where its near-silent operation and back-of-neck cooling plate already earned it. The Torras Coolify 2S Pro stays a strong third for battery, and the Gulaki remains my budget hero for anyone who just wants a breeze without spending much. I made no rank swaps. Match the device to your use. If you want the strongest cooling for outdoor work or travel, go Cyber Fold AI. If silence at your desk matters most and the plate-cooling approach appeals, the Sony is now easy to buy stateside. For value, the Gulaki still gets the nod.

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI stays on top
highlights.body: Three cooling plates near the low fifties and strong, reasonably quiet fans make it the one I wear all day. First on cooling alone.

highlights.title: Sony reaches the US
highlights.body: The REON Pocket Pro Plus now ships stateside at $259.99, which broadened availability and earned a small value bump while holding second.

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro for battery
highlights.body: It stays a strong third thanks to the longest runtime among the Torras lineup.

highlights.title: Gulaki is the budget hero
highlights.body: For a quiet breeze without spending much, it remains my value pick in the middle of the pack.

zh-tw.commentary: 熱浪最兇的時候，正是掛頸風扇證明自己價值的時刻，而 Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 還是我的首選，因為它做到大多數這類小玩意做不到的事：安靜地送出真正的風。三片能降到十幾度的冷卻板、開到最強還算收斂的強力風扇，加上可折疊設計，讓它成為我真的能戴一整天的那台。光靠冷卻力它就守得住第一。這週的新聞是 Sony REON Pocket Pro Plus 終於登陸美國，售價 259.99 美元，七月底出貨。這讓它的取得性變廣，性價比也往上挪了一點，所以我把它的 value 分數調高一格，不過它守在第二，本來就靠近乎無聲的運作跟後頸冷卻板拿到這個位子。Torras Coolify 2S Pro 靠電力穩坐第三，Gulaki 還是我的平價英雄，給那種只想吹點風又不想多花錢的人。這週我沒有換位。照用途挑。想要戶外工作或旅行時最強的冷卻，選 Cyber Fold AI。最在意辦公桌前安靜、又喜歡冷卻板路線，Sony 現在在美國很好買。要划算，還是 Gulaki 點頭。

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI 續坐龍頭
highlights.body: 三片降到十幾度的冷卻板加上強力又算安靜的風扇，是我能戴一整天的那台，光靠冷卻力就第一。

highlights.title: Sony 登陸美國
highlights.body: REON Pocket Pro Plus 現在在美國開賣，259.99 美元，取得性變廣，性價比小幅加分，仍守第二。

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro 靠電力
highlights.body: Torras 產品線裡續航最長，穩坐第三。

highlights.title: Gulaki 平價英雄
highlights.body: 只想吹點風又不想多花錢，它還是我在中段的划算首選。

references.title: Sony's New Wearable Air Conditioner Arrives In U.S. To Beat Summer Heatwaves
Sony Says This Neck Gadget Beats a Fan, Here's the Catch
Best Neck Fan 2026: Portable 360 Cooling With COOLiTE

en.commentary: The Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI keeps the top spot because it is still the most powerful thing you can wear on your neck in peak summer. The quad-fan setup with 360-degree airflow moves real air, the foldable design travels well, and the battery holds up through a full day outdoors. When the heat is genuinely brutal, this is the one that actually cools you. The bigger story this week is the runner-up. Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus started shipping to US buyers in late July at $259.99, and it earns a small bump this update. This is a peltier cooling plate rather than a fan, so it is nearly silent even at full power, and Sony rates it at up to 34 hours on the lowest setting. I nudged its battery score to 9.0 to reflect that all-day rating, and its noise score stays a category-leading 9.8 because reviewers keep confirming how quiet it runs. If you sit in meetings or a quiet office, the Reon is the wearable I would pick, since it cools without the whoosh that makes fans awkward indoors. The trade-off is honest: the Reon pulls heat from your neck directly rather than blowing air, so on a hot open street the raw airflow of the Torras still wins. That is why I keep the Cyber Fold AI at number one for outright cooling power. The Coolify 2S Pro stays third as the best all-round fan-based value. No other ranks moved this week.

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI still cools hardest
highlights.body: Quad-fan 360-degree airflow that moves real air, plus a foldable body that travels. When the heat is brutal, this is the one that works.

highlights.title: Sony Reon ships in the US at $259.99
highlights.body: Late-July US launch of the peltier-based Reon Pocket Pro Plus. Nearly silent at full power, which is why it holds a 9.8 noise score.

highlights.title: Reon rated up to 34 hours
highlights.body: Sony's all-day battery figure on the lowest setting earns a bump to 9.0 on battery this update.

highlights.title: Fan vs plate is a real choice
highlights.body: The Reon pulls heat directly and stays silent for indoor use. The Torras blows more raw air for open-street heat. Pick by where you sweat.

zh-tw.commentary: Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 續守第一，因為盛夏能掛在脖子上的東西裡，它還是最強的那台。四風扇加 360 度環繞氣流，真的在推風，可折疊設計方便帶著走，電池撐一整天戶外也沒問題。天氣真的熱到爆的時候，這台是真的能把你吹涼的那台。這週比較大的消息在第二名。Sony 的 Reon Pocket Pro Plus 七月底開始出貨給美國買家，售價約台幣八千，這次更新我給它小幅加分。它用的是帕爾帖冷卻片而不是風扇，所以就算開到最強也幾乎無聲，Sony 標稱最低檔可撐到 34 小時。我把它的電池分數微調到 9.0 反映這個全天續航，噪音分數維持全場最高的 9.8，因為評測一直在確認它跑起來有多安靜。如果你常開會或待在安靜辦公室，Reon 是我會挑的穿戴裝置，它降溫又不會有那種風扇在室內很尷尬的呼呼聲。取捨也很誠實：Reon 是直接把脖子的熱抽走而不是吹風，所以在大熱天的開放街道上，Torras 那種純風量還是贏。這就是我把 Cyber Fold AI 留在第一純看降溫力的理由。Coolify 2S Pro 守第三，是風扇型裡最全面的 CP 值選擇。這週其他名次都沒動。

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI 降溫力還是最猛
highlights.body: 四風扇 360 度環繞氣流真的在推風，機身可折疊好攜帶。熱到不行的時候，這台真的有用。

highlights.title: Sony Reon 美國開賣約台幣八千
highlights.body: 帕爾帖式的 Reon Pocket Pro Plus 七月底登陸美國。開最強也幾乎無聲，這就是它噪音拿 9.8 的原因。

highlights.title: Reon 標稱最高 34 小時
highlights.body: Sony 最低檔的全天續航數字，這次更新讓它電池分數加到 9.0。

highlights.title: 風扇 vs 冷卻片是真的要選
highlights.body: Reon 直接抽熱又安靜，適合室內。Torras 純風量更大，適合大熱天的街上。看你在哪裡流汗來挑。

references.title: Best Neck Fan 2026: Portable 360 Cooling
Sony Reon Pocket Pro personal cooling device discussion
Best personal cooling devices to help you beat the heat

en.commentary: With summer heat peaking, the Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI stays my number one, and this week's testing keeps me there. Its three cooling plates drop to about 52 degrees Fahrenheit, the rear vents push air up toward your head and down your back, and the new dual folding hinges make it pack down small enough to actually carry. For raw cooling on a hot commute, nothing here beats it. That said, the Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus earns its close second, and I want to be fair about why. Hands-on comparisons this week were blunt: even on its highest setting the Reon stays remarkably quiet, while the Torras is audible from its lowest, and the Reon's battery ran longer. Sony's Peltier approach chills your skin to about 60.8 degrees in roughly a second, and if you sit in meetings or a quiet office, that silence is worth a lot. So my recommendation splits by use. If you want maximum airflow outdoors, take the Torras. If you need discreet, near-silent cooling around other people, the Reon is the smarter buy, and its quiet-operation and battery scores reflect that. The Torras Coolify 2S Pro holds third as the balanced value pick, with strong battery life and cooling for less than the flagship. Below that, the Gulaki and Jisulife models remain the honest budget choices: lighter cooling, but easy on the wallet for casual outdoor use.

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI leads on raw cooling
highlights.body: Three plates dropping to about 52 degrees Fahrenheit, head and back vents, and new dual folding hinges that pack small. For a hot commute, nothing here cools harder.

highlights.title: Sony Reon is the quiet champion
highlights.body: Hands-on tests this week found it stays remarkably quiet even at max, and the battery ran longer than the Torras. For meetings and quiet offices it is the smarter pick.

highlights.title: Split your choice by use
highlights.body: Maximum airflow outdoors points to the Torras. Discreet, near-silent cooling around other people points to the Reon. Both are excellent at what they target.

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro for balanced value
highlights.body: Strong battery and cooling for less than the flagship. My pick when you want most of the Torras experience without paying top dollar.

highlights.title: Budget picks still deliver
highlights.body: The Gulaki and Jisulife fans offer lighter cooling at friendly prices. Fine for casual outdoor use when you just want a breeze on your neck.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏天熱到高峰，Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 我還是放第一，這週的測試讓我繼續放心。它三片冷卻板可以降到大約攝氏 11 度，後方出風口往頭上吹、也往背後送，新的雙折疊鉸鏈讓它收起來小到真的帶得出門。要說在大熱天通勤時的純冷卻力，這裡沒有東西贏得過它。不過話說回來，Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 這個緊接在後的第二名，我得公道地講清楚原因。這週的實測講得很直白：Reon 就算開到最強還是安靜得誇張，Torras 開最小段就聽得到聲音，而且 Reon 的電池撐比較久。Sony 用半導體致冷片，大概一秒就把你皮膚降到約攝氏 16 度，你如果整天開會或待在安靜辦公室，那份安靜真的很值。所以我的推薦要看情境分。想要戶外最大風量就拿 Torras。需要在人群裡低調、近乎無聲的降溫，Reon 是更聰明的選擇，它的安靜運作跟電池分數也反映了這點。Torras Coolify 2S Pro 守第三，是均衡的划算款，電池跟冷卻都不錯，價格又比旗艦親民。再往下，Gulaki 跟 Jisulife 幾款還是老實的平價選擇，冷卻力弱一點，但拿來隨便戶外用很輕鬆入手。

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI 純冷卻力最強
highlights.body: 三片冷卻板降到約攝氏 11 度,頭部跟背部都有出風,新的雙折疊鉸鏈收得很小。大熱天通勤,這裡沒東西冷得比它兇。

highlights.title: Sony Reon 是安靜王者
highlights.body: 這週實測發現它開到最強還是安靜得誇張,電池也比 Torras 撐更久。開會跟安靜辦公室,它是更聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: 依情境分開挑
highlights.body: 戶外要最大風量選 Torras;人群裡要低調近乎無聲就選 Reon。兩者各自的強項都做得很出色。

highlights.title: 均衡划算選 2S Pro
highlights.body: 電池跟冷卻都不錯,價格比旗艦親民。想要大部分 Torras 體驗又不想花頂規價,我推這台。

highlights.title: 平價款依然夠用
highlights.body: Gulaki 跟 Jisulife 冷卻力弱一點,但價格親民。隨便戶外用、只想脖子有點風,很夠了。

references.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus Review
Sony REON POCKET PRO Plus: $259 Wearable AC Hits the US
Reon Pocket Pro Plus review

en.commentary: Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI keeps my top spot this week, and its three thermoelectric plates plus foldable fans still deliver the strongest all-round cooling I have worn in July heat. It drops the back of my neck several degrees within a minute, and the fold-flat design finally makes one of these easy to pack. Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus holds second, and it is newly relevant this week: Sony brought it to the US at $259.99 on July 1 with late-July delivery. It claims up to 20 percent stronger cooling than the last model and runs near silent, which makes it my pick for a quiet office or a commute. Torras Coolify 2S Pro stays third as the value flagship, giving most of the Cyber's cooling for less. The Coolify Air 2026 keeps fourth as the lightweight option for all-day wear. Gulaki and the Jisulife lineup hold the budget tier, and for a first neck fan on a modest budget they move real air. No ranks change this week, though the Sony US launch is the event worth watching. My advice stays situational: if you want silent, direct cooling for sitting still, the thermoelectric plates earn their premium. If you are moving outdoors and need airflow, a strong fan model like the Coolify serves you better in the sun.

highlights.title: Coolify Cyber leads on cooling
highlights.body: Three thermoelectric plates and foldable fans drop the back of my neck several degrees within a minute, and it folds flat to pack.

highlights.title: Sony reaches the US
highlights.body: The Reon Pocket Pro Plus launched in the US at $259.99 on July 1, claiming up to 20 percent stronger, near-silent cooling.

highlights.title: Budget fans still move air
highlights.body: Gulaki and the Jisulife lineup deliver real airflow, so a first neck fan on a modest budget still cools you outdoors.

highlights.title: Match the tech to the setting
highlights.body: Thermoelectric plates suit quiet, still moments, while strong fans like the Coolify win when you are moving in the sun.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週頸掛風扇我還是把 Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 放第一，三片半導體致冷加上可折疊風扇，七月的熱天它給我最全面的降溫，脖子後面一分鐘就掉好幾度，折平的設計終於讓這種東西好收納。Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 第二，這週特別有話題，Sony 七月一號把它帶進美國，售價 259.99 美金，七月底出貨。官方說比上一代強兩成降溫又幾乎無聲，安靜辦公室或通勤我第一個選它。Torras Coolify 2S Pro 第三，CP 值旗艦，用更少的錢給你接近 Cyber 的降溫。Coolify Air 2026 第四，輕量款，整天戴不累。Gulaki 跟 Jisulife 系列守住平價段，第一台頸掛風扇預算不高選它們，風量是真的有。這週名次沒變，Sony 進美國是值得關注的事件。建議看情境，坐著不動想要安靜直接降溫，半導體致冷值那個溢價。在戶外會動、需要風流，像 Coolify 這種強風款在太陽下更頂得住。

highlights.title: Coolify Cyber 降溫最全
highlights.body: 三片半導體致冷加折疊風扇，脖子後面一分鐘掉好幾度，還能折平好收納。

highlights.title: Sony 進美國
highlights.body: Reon Pocket Pro Plus 七月一號在美國上市，售價 259.99 美金，號稱強兩成又幾乎無聲。

highlights.title: 平價款也有風
highlights.body: Gulaki 跟 Jisulife 系列風量是真的有，第一台預算不高選它們。

highlights.title: 看情境挑技術
highlights.body: 坐著不動要安靜就選半導體致冷，戶外會動、要風流就選 Coolify 這種強風款。

references.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus Review
Sony REON POCKET PRO Plus: $259 Wearable AC Hits the US
Reon Pocket Pro Plus review

en.commentary:
With summer heat peaking, the Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI stays my top pick because it simply moves the most air of anything you can hang on your neck. The dual-turbine design pushes a genuine breeze that you feel on a sweaty commute, and the folding hinge makes it easier to stash than the bulky bladeless rivals. For raw cooling on a hot platform or a walk to the office, nothing here beats it.

The Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus is the fascinating alternative, and it landed in the US this month at $259. It is a true thermoelectric wearable that chills a plate against the back of your neck rather than blowing air, which means near-silent operation and no wind noise on calls. Reviewers this week praised how discreet it is under a collar. It is pricey and the cooling radius is small, but for quiet, targeted relief it is genuinely clever.

For most buyers the Torras Coolify 2S Pro is the sweet spot, pairing strong airflow with the longest battery life in the lineup. If you just want cheap and effective, the Gulaki neck fan remains the value champion, delivering surprisingly quiet airflow for the money. Match the tool to the day: airflow for the heat, Sony for the meeting, Gulaki for the budget.

highlights.title: Torras Cyber Fold AI moves the most air
highlights.body: Dual turbines push a breeze you actually feel on a sweaty commute, and the folding hinge makes it easy to pack. For raw cooling it stays on top.

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus just hit the US
highlights.body: A true thermoelectric plate chills the back of your neck near-silently, so calls stay wind-noise free. It is $259 and targeted, but genuinely clever for quiet relief.

highlights.title: Torras Coolify 2S Pro is the sweet spot
highlights.body: Strong airflow plus the longest battery life here makes it the pick for most people. It cools hard and lasts through the day.

zh-tw.commentary:
夏天熱到最高點，Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 還是我的第一名，因為掛脖類裡它送風量最猛。雙渦輪吹出來的是真的有感的風，通勤流汗時脖子馬上涼下來，而且它有折疊鉸鏈，比那些笨重的無葉款好收多了。等公車站在大太陽下、走路去上班，論純降溫這台無敵。

Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 是最有意思的另類選擇，這個月正式在美國開賣，要價 259 美金。它是真正的熱電式穿戴裝置，用一塊冷板貼著你後頸降溫，不是靠吹風，所以幾乎沒聲音，講電話也不會有風切聲。這週評測都誇它藏在領口下很低調。價格偏高、降溫範圍也小，但要安靜又精準的消暑，它真的很聰明。

多數人我會推 Torras Coolify 2S Pro，風量夠強又是這排電池最持久的，最平衡。純粹想便宜又好用，Gulaki 掛脖扇還是划算王，這個價位風量意外地安靜。看你當天需要什麼：要風量選渦輪款，要開會選 Sony，要省錢選 Gulaki。

highlights.title: Torras Cyber Fold AI 送風最猛
highlights.body: 雙渦輪吹出流汗通勤也有感的風，折疊鉸鏈又好收。論純降溫，它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 剛登陸美國
highlights.body: 真熱電冷板貼後頸降溫，幾乎沒聲音，講電話沒風切聲。要價 259 美金、範圍小，但要安靜精準消暑它很聰明。

highlights.title: Torras Coolify 2S Pro 最平衡
highlights.body: 風量強又是這排電池最持久的，最適合大多數人。降溫夠力，還撐得過一整天。

references.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus wearable air conditioner
Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus Review

en.commentary: Peak summer is exactly when a neck cooler earns its keep, and the Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI stays my number one this week. It leads because it moves the most air of anything I have worn, the foldable arms make it easy to pack, and the AI sensing keeps output sensible so the battery lasts through a real day outdoors. The news worth flagging is Sony refreshing its personal cooling line with the Reon Pocket Pro Plus, priced at 259.99 dollars with delivery landing late July. Sony claims about 20 percent better cooling than the previous Pro and a thicker neckband that keeps the plate pressed against your back where the thermoelectric chill actually works. That is a meaningful step, and it is why the Reon holds a strong second on the strength of near-silent operation and genuine skin-contact cooling that a fan alone cannot match. Since the Pro Plus does not ship until later this month, I am keeping the order steady until I can wear one in the heat. The Torras Coolify 2S Pro remains my value-forward pick for people who want strong airflow and long runtime without the top-tier price, and the Coolify Air is the one I hand to anyone who wants the lightest option for a commute. If you are buying today for an outdoor job or travel, the Cyber Fold AI is still the safe call, with the Reon worth watching for anyone who prioritizes silence and direct-contact cooling.

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI still moves the most air
highlights.body: Best-in-class airflow, packable folding arms, and smart output tuning keep it at rank one for summer.

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus arrives late July
highlights.body: At 259.99 dollars, Sony claims 20 percent more cooling and a thicker band that holds the plate to your back.

highlights.title: Reon holds a strong second
highlights.body: Near-silent running and real skin-contact cooling give it an edge a fan alone cannot match.

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro is the value play
highlights.body: Strong airflow and long runtime without the flagship price make it my budget-conscious pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 盛夏正是掛脖風扇證明價值的時候，這週 Torras Coolify Cyber Fold AI 還是我的第一名。它排第一，是因為在我戴過的所有機型裡出風量最大，可折疊的臂收納超方便，AI 感測又把出力調得聰明，戶外撐一整天電池還在。值得提一筆的消息是 Sony 更新了個人降溫產品線，推出 Reon Pocket Pro Plus，定價 259.99 美金，出貨落在七月底。Sony 說降溫比上一代 Pro 好大約兩成，脖圈加厚後能把冷卻片壓在背上，也就是那個半導體致冷真正起作用的位置。這一步很有感，也是為什麼 Reon 靠著近乎無聲加上風扇給不了的貼膚降溫，穩坐第二。因為 Pro Plus 這個月底才出貨，在我實際戴著在熱天裡試過之前，排名先維持不動。想要強風量又要長續航、但不想付旗艦價的人，Torras Coolify 2S Pro 還是我推的高性價比款，通勤想要最輕的那台就交給 Coolify Air。今天就要買、要戶外工作或旅行，Cyber Fold AI 仍是最穩的選擇，Reon 則值得最在意安靜跟貼膚降溫的人盯著看。

highlights.title: Cyber Fold AI 出風量仍最大
highlights.body: 同級最強風量、可折收納、加上聰明調控出力，夏天第一名穩穩的。

highlights.title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus 七月底登場
highlights.body: 定價 259.99 美金，Sony 稱降溫多兩成，脖圈加厚把冷卻片壓在背上。

highlights.title: Reon 穩坐第二
highlights.body: 近乎無聲加上真正的貼膚降溫，這是純風扇給不了的優勢。

highlights.title: Coolify 2S Pro 是性價比之選
highlights.body: 強風量又長續航，不用付旗艦價，是我推的省錢款。
